allow: Bash(.venv/Scripts/python -c "import fastapi, httpx, lxml, click, jinja2; print\('all imports OK'\)")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python -c "from config import load_config; from ingest import get_db; db = get_db\(\); print\('DB init OK'\); db.close\(\)")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python -c "import ast; [ast.parse\(open\(f\).read\(\)\) for f in ['app.py','queries.py']]; print\('syntax ok'\)")

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python -c "from queries import get_issuer_trend, render_sparkline; from ingest import get_db; db=get_db\(\); t=get_issuer_trend\(db,'AAPL'\); print\(len\(t\),'weeks'\); svg=render_sparkline\(t\); print\('svg len',len\(svg\)\); db.close\(\)")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python -m ruff check app.py queries.py config.py)
Bash(sed -i 's/not_reached  = \\[t for t in trades if not t\\["sell_half_sold"\\]\\]//' backtest_nearentry.py)

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python -c "from ingest import get_db; db = get_db\(\); tables = [r[0] for r in db.execute\(\\"SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' ORDER BY name\\"\)]; print\('Tables:', tables\)")

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python -c "import queries; print\('MARKET_CAP_TIERS:', list\(queries.MARKET_CAP_TIERS.keys\(\)\)\); import inspect; sig = inspect.signature\(queries.get_filings_for_date\); print\('market_cap_tiers param:', sig.parameters.get\('market_cap_tiers'\)\)")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python -c "from ingest import get_db; db=get_db\(\); print\([r[1] for r in db.execute\('PRAGMA table_info\(ticker_metadata\)'\).fetchall\(\)]\)")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python -c "from queries import get_filings_for_date, get_filings_count, _build_filings_where; print\('queries OK'\)")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python -c "from polygon_client import fetch_latest_close; print\('polygon OK'\)")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python -c "from dotenv import load_dotenv; load_dotenv\(\); import os; k=os.environ.get\('POLYGON_API_KEY',''\); print\('key set:', bool\(k\), 'len:', len\(k\)\)")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python -m ruff check alerts.py ingest.py polygon_client.py config.py)

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python -c "import psycopg; from dotenv import load_dotenv; import os; load_dotenv\(\); conn = psycopg.connect\(os.getenv\('DATABASE_URL'\)\); cur = conn.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS n FROM filings WHERE superseded_by IS NULL AND joint_filer_of IS NULL'\); print\('Total filings:', cur.fetchone\(\)['n']\); cur2 = conn.execute\(\\"SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS n FROM filings WHERE superseded_by IS NULL AND joint_filer_of IS NULL AND filed_at::date >= CURRENT_DATE - 7\\"\); print\('Last 7 days:', cur2.fetchone\(\)['n']\); conn.close\(\)")
